knife_work.name: Snap Peas
knife_work.prep: ends trimmed, halved on a diagonal

steps.action_description: Get all your chopping done first. This makes the cooking part stress-free! Separate the scallion whites from the greens. Put the chicken and bacon on one plate, and the veggies on another.

meanwhile.action: Start a large pot of salted water boiling.

steps.action_description: In a large cold skillet, add the bacon bits. Turn heat to medium. Cook until the fat renders and the bacon is super crispy. In the last 2 mins, toss in the pumpkin and sesame seeds to toast in the bacon fat. Remove EVERYTHING with a slotted spoon to a paper towel, but LEAVE THE FAT in the pan!

meanwhile.action: Drop the pasta into the boiling water.

steps.action_description: Increase heat to medium-high. Add chicken to the bacon fat. Don't crowd the pan! Let them sit for 3 mins without moving to get a brown crust. Flip and cook until done. **PULL:** Remove a few pieces of plain chicken and bacon for the kids now!

meanwhile.action: Get your onions and snap peas ready.

steps.action_description: Add the onion and scallion whites to the pan. Sauté for 2 mins. Add the snap peas, garlic, turmeric, and ginger. Stir constantly for 2 mins. The snap peas should stay bright green and 'snappy'—don't let them get soft! **PULL:** Scoop out some plain snap peas for the kids.

meanwhile.action: In a bowl, whisk coconut milk, 3 egg yolks, and a pinch of salt until smooth.

steps.action_description: **CRITICAL STEP:** Turn heat to LOW. Add the cooked pasta (save a splash of pasta water!). Pour in the coconut-egg mixture. Stir VIGOROUSLY and constantly for 2-3 mins. The residual heat will thicken the eggs into a silky sauce. If it looks too dry, add a splash of pasta water. DO NOT let it boil or the eggs will scramble!

meanwhile.action: Get your crispy bacon, seeds, and scallion greens ready.

steps.action_description: Fold in half of the crispy bacon/seed mix. Plate the pasta and top with the remaining crunch and scallion greens. Season with fresh black pepper.

meanwhile.action: Serve the kids their plain pasta with butter, plain chicken, and plain snap peas!
